cards.front: What is the purpose of the assignment operator in Java?
cards.back: The assignment operator is used to assign a value to a variable

cards.front: What is the difference between the ternary operator and the if-else statement?
cards.back: The ternary operator is used for a single-line if-else condition, while the if-else statement is used for more complex conditions

cards.front: What is the operator precedence for multiplication and division?
cards.back: Multiplication and division have higher precedence than addition and subtraction

cards.front: What is the purpose of the '??' operator in Java?
cards.back: The '??' operator is used to provide a default value if the variable on its left is null or undefined

cards.front: What is the purpose of operator precedence in Java?
cards.back: Operator precedence determines the order in which operators are evaluated in an expression
